query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'report_outputs' AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('accounting'))
CREATE TABLE accounting.report_outputs (
  id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,
  report_type NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  generated_at DATETIME2 DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
  parameters_json NVARCHAR(MAX),
  content_markdown NVARCHAR(MAX),
  status NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'ready',
  generated_by NVARCHAR(100),
  from_date DATE,
  to_date DATE,
  currency NVARCHAR(10)
);
